message:
feat(vdbe,pager): FCW commit index integration and snapshot publication plane enhancements

MVCC conflict detection (engine.rs):
- Add commit_index: Arc<CommitIndex> to ConcurrentContext for page-level
  commit history tracking
- Update SharedTxnPageIo::with_concurrent() to accept and store commit index
- Add pre-write validation in PageWriter::write_page() that queries commit
  index for latest page commit, compares against snapshot high-water mark,
  and rejects with BusySnapshot if page has newer commit outside snapshot
- Emit structured tracing with visibility_decision and conflict_reason fields

Snapshot publication (pager.rs):
- Add publish_lock: Mutex<()> to PublishedPagerState to serialize publication
  updates and prevent concurrent publish races
- Add publish_observed_page() method for conflict-aware page observation that
  checks commit sequence staleness and skips stale reads with tracing
- Add published_visible_commit_seq to SimpleTransaction for capturing visible
  commit state at transaction start
- Modify read loop to exit when visible commit sequence advances (indicates
  concurrent commits that might conflict)
- Implement committed snapshot observation within publication plane for
  improved concurrent read fairness

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
